case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. ESTEBAN ACEVEDO ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210020752) TO PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACEVEDO, ESTEBAN $2,238.18 PRINCIPAL, $314.02 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,552.20, SEE SCANNED DOC
